briefs.title: BC Low Carbon Fuel Carbon Intensity Limits Updated; Non-Compliance Penalty Tripled to $600
briefs.summary: Effective January 1, 2023, BC's Renewable and Low Carbon Fuel Requirements Regulation was amended to update carbon intensity limits for diesel and gasoline class fuels for 2030+ compliance periods, and to triple the non-compliance penalty from $200 to $600.
briefs.action_required: Review your fuel supply chain to ensure compliance with updated carbon intensity limits and budget for the increased $600 penalty.

key_dates.label: BC Renewable and Low Carbon Fuel Requirements Regulation amendments take effect
